channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Introducing Composer 2.5
item.description: A substantial improvement in intelligence and behavior over Composer 2, particularly on long-horizon agentic tasks.

item.title: What we’ve learned building cloud agents
item.description: After a year of shipping cloud agents, we’ve learned that environment quality, durable execution, and the right harness boundaries drive autonomous performance.

item.title: Cursor named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents
item.description: Gartner has named Cursor a Leader in the 2026 Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with the furthest placement on Completeness of Vision.
